mapper.sql: USER_CD, USER_PWD, COMPANY_ID, AUTHORITY, FIRST_NAME_KANA,FIRST_NAME, LAST_NAME_KANA, LAST_NAME, SEX, COUNTRY_ZIP, USER_TEL, USER_MAIL, USER_PHOTO, REGIST_DATE, REGIST_USER, UPDATE_DATE, USER_STATUS
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO user_tbl (
) VALUES ( DEFAULT, #{pwd}, #{companyId}, #{authority}, #{firstNameKana}, #{firstName}, #{lastNameKana}, #{lastName}, #{sex}, #{countryZip}, #{userTel}, #{userMail}, #{photoAddress}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0), 'SYSTEM', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0), DEFAULT )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(USER_TEL) FROM user_tbl WHERE TRIM(USER_TEL) = TRIM(#{userTel})
